info.title: NWDAF ML Service
info.description: Model instantiation, training, and inference service

get.description:
Get all registered models, optionally filtered by output field name.

Pass include_details=true to receive enriched metadata (last_trained_at,
best_for_fields, score_per_field, is_training, etc.) at no extra cost -
uses a single MLflow search call regardless of model count.

schema.title: Response Get Models V1 Models Get

post.description: Create a new model with field validation

get.description: Get model by ID
Get all available fields from data storage.

schema.title: Response Get Fields V1 Fields Get

get.description:
List training jobs with optional filters.

Args:
    model_id: Filter by model ID
    status: Filter by status (queued, running, completed, failed, cancelled)
    training_service: Training service dependency

Returns:
    List of training job summaries

schema.title: Response List Training Jobs V1 Training Jobs Get

get.description:
Get detailed information about a specific training job.

Args:
    job_id: Training job ID
    training_service: Training service dependency

Returns:
    Detailed job information

delete.description:
Cancel a training job.

Args:
    job_id: Training job ID to cancel
    training_service: Training service dependency

Returns:
    No content (204)

post.description:
Run inference on a trained model for a specific cell.

Fetches the most recent data for the given cell, runs the trained
model, and returns structured predictions per forecast step.

Score all trained models that predict field_name using the chosen metric.

All models competing on the same field are scored with the same metric,
keeping comparison fair. The metric is persisted so subsequent /monitor
calls automatically use the same one. Defaults to RMSE.

get.description:
Return the model currently designated as best for field_name.

Reads the persisted best_for:{field_name} MLflow tag. Returns 404 if no
evaluation has been run yet for this field.

post.description: Override the best model for a field without running a new evaluation.

Re-evaluate only the current best model for field_name.

Uses the same metric as the original election (stored as eval_metric:{field}
MLflow tag). Updates score_for and eval_at tags but does NOT change the
best_for designation - only a full /evaluate call can change that.

Returns 422 if no best model has been designated yet.

get.description: Return the current state machine state for a monitored field.

Return the full score measurement history for field_name, oldest first.

Includes every evaluate, monitor, and auto_monitor measurement written
to the score_history table. Optionally filter by model_id.

Return cached permutation importance for field_name.

If model_id is omitted, returns importance for the elected best model.
Returns 404 if no importance has been computed yet.

post.description:
Compute and store permutation importance for a specific model on demand.

Loads the model, fetches data, runs alibi PermutationImportance, stores results
as MLflow tags and returns the result. Use GET /importance to read cached results.

get.description:
Return the last cached evaluation result for field_name.

Reads persisted MLflow tags - no model loading or data fetching occurs.
Models that have never been evaluated will appear with score=None.
List all anomaly detection models.

schema.title: Response List Anomaly Models V1 Anomaly Models Get

post.description: Create a new anomaly detection model.

get.description: Get anomaly model details.

post.description: Start training an anomaly detection model.

get.description: List anomaly training jobs.

schema.title: Response List Anomaly Training Jobs V1 Anomaly Training Jobs Get

get.description: Get anomaly training job details.

post.description:
Run anomaly detection for all trained models matching the event_type in tags.
If model_id is provided, only that model is used.
Compute and cache permutation importance for an anomaly model.

get.description: Get cached permutation importance for an anomaly model.
Return resource usage for all models; idle models have null resource fields.
Return Prometheus text-format metrics for all models (0 when idle).
Return Prometheus text-format metrics for a specific model (0 when idle).

put.description: Set default resource requests for a model's training jobs (forecast or anomaly).

get.description: Get default resource requests for a model (forecast or anomaly). Returns null if not set.

schema.title: Response Get Model Resource Defaults V1 Resources Defaults  Model Id  Get
Response List Architectures V1 Architectures Get

get.description: Download model_interface.py — the base class all custom architectures must extend.
Root endpoint.
Health check endpoint.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: UUID of the trained anomaly model to use. If omitted, the system selects the compatible trained model with lowest training loss.

lookback_seconds.title: Lookback Seconds
lookback_seconds.description: How far back to fetch data (seconds, default 30min)

explain.title: Explain
explain.description: If true, compute KernelSHAP local attributions for each anomalous window. Significantly slower (~200 model calls per anomalous window). Requires the model to have been retrained after explainability support was added.

AnomalyDetectionRequest.title: AnomalyDetectionRequest
AnomalyDetectionRequest.description: Request schema for running anomaly detection.

AnomalyDetectionResult.title: AnomalyDetectionResult
AnomalyDetectionResult.description: Full anomaly detection response for a cell.

models.title: Models
models.description: Model metadata keyed by model name

anomaly_counts.title: Anomaly Counts
anomaly_counts.description: Anomaly counts per model ID (e.g. '3/10' = 3 anomalies out of 10 windows)

results.title: Results
results.description: Full per-window results including explanations. Populated when explain=True.

importances.title: Importances
importances.description: Per-feature importance. Positive mean = shuffling this feature worsened reconstruction: feature is important to the model.

AnomalyFeatureImportanceResponse.title: AnomalyFeatureImportanceResponse
AnomalyFeatureImportanceResponse.description: Permutation importance result for an anomaly model.

mean.title: Mean
mean.description: Mean reconstruction error degradation across n_repeats shuffles

std.title: Std
std.description: Std deviation across repeats — high std = noisy estimate

AnomalyFeatureImportanceValue.title: AnomalyFeatureImportanceValue
AnomalyFeatureImportanceValue.description: Mean and std of permutation importance across repeats.

attributions.title: Attributions
attributions.description: Per-feature SHAP contribution to reconstruction error. Positive = feature drove error up (anomaly driver). Negative = feature drove error down. Sum of attributions ≈ reconstruction_error - baseline.

baseline.title: Baseline
baseline.description: E[f(X)] — expected reconstruction error over training background

AnomalyLocalExplanation.title: AnomalyLocalExplanation
AnomalyLocalExplanation.description: KernelSHAP local explanation for a single anomalous window.

threshold_percentile.title: Threshold Percentile
threshold_percentile.description: Percentile of training reconstruction errors used as anomaly threshold

event.title: Event
event.description: Optional 5G event type (e.g. 'PERF_DATA'). Auto-derived from fields if omitted.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique model name (alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen only)

AnomalyModelCreate.title: AnomalyModelCreate
AnomalyModelCreate.description: Request schema for creating an anomaly model.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: 5G event type this model belongs to

mlflow_run_id.title: Mlflow Run Id
mlflow_run_id.description: MLflow run ID of the latest training

training_loss.title: Training Loss
training_loss.description: Final training loss from latest run

AnomalyModelDetail.description: Detailed response for an anomaly model.

AnomalyModelMeta.description: Metadata for a model used in a summary.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: 5G event type this model belongs to

AnomalyTrainingJobSummary.description: Summary information for listing anomaly training jobs.

model_id.description: UUID of the anomaly model to train

lookback_seconds.title: Lookback Seconds
lookback_seconds.description: How far back to fetch data (e.g., 604800 for 7 days, max 30 days)

EvalMetricType.description: Supported evaluation metrics for model performance scoring.

importances.title: Importances
importances.description: Per-feature permutation importance.mean: score degradation when feature is shuffled.std: stability of the estimate across repeats.

FeatureImportanceResponse.title: FeatureImportanceResponse
FeatureImportanceResponse.description: Permutation importance scores for each input feature of the best model.

mean.title: Mean
mean.description: Mean score degradation across n_repeats shuffles

FeatureImportanceValue.title: FeatureImportanceValue
FeatureImportanceValue.description: Mean and standard deviation of permutation importance across n_repeats shuffles.

models.title: Models

step.description: Forecast step number (1 = nearest future window)

values.description: Predicted values keyed by output field name

ForecastStepPrediction.description: Prediction values for a single forecast step

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: UUID of the trained model to use for prediction

explain.title: Explain
explain.description: If true, compute local attributions alongside the prediction. Significantly slower, as it loads training-time background from MLflow artifact.

tags.description: Tag filters used to fetch data

lookback_steps.title: Lookback Steps
lookback_steps.description: Number of historical windows used as input

window_duration_seconds.title: Window Duration Seconds
window_duration_seconds.description: Duration of each time window in seconds

input_data_start.description: Start timestamp of first input window used (epoch seconds)

input_data_end.title: Input Data End
input_data_end.description: End timestamp of last input window used (epoch seconds)

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.description: Predictions broken down by forecast step and output field

explanation.description: Local explanation. Populated only when explain=true in the request.

prediction.title: Prediction
prediction.description: Forecast values for the explained field across forecast steps

attributions.title: Attributions
attributions.description: Per-feature SHAP value.Positive = feature pushed prediction above baselineNegative = feature pushed prediction below baselineSum of all attributions = prediction_mean - baseline

baseline.title: Baseline
baseline.description: Expected model output over training background dataset

LocalExplanationResponse.title: LocalExplanationResponse
LocalExplanationResponse.description: Local explanation for a single prediction.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Architecture name — must match an uploaded architecture in the registry

output_fields.title: Output Fields
output_fields.description: List of output field names to predict (e.g., ['latency_mean'])

window_duration_seconds.title: Window Duration Seconds
window_duration_seconds.description: Data window granularity in seconds (60 or 300)

lookback_steps.title: Lookback Steps
lookback_steps.description: Number of past time windows to use as input (e.g., 30 windows)

forecast_steps.title: Forecast Steps
forecast_steps.description: Number of future time windows to predict (e.g., 5 windows)

event.title: Event
event.description: Optional 5G event type (e.g. 'PERF_DATA'). Auto-derived from fields if omitted.

Immutable model configuration.

Defines the model's structure, data shape, and window settings.
Once created, this config cannot be changed.
